subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which the Tongue of God inspireth thee from His sacred, mighty and impregnable dominion, that perchance thou mayest hear the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یلهمک لسان الله عن جبروته المقدس العزیز المنیع لعل تسمع ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Word of God and human limitations, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
